settlement.description: Trades settled two business days after execution

circuit_breaker.description: Daily trading limit from previous close; suspended if limit reached

LDCP.definition: The closing price of a security from the previous trading session, used as reference for circuit breaker calculations

PDC.definition: Same as LDCP; previous trading day's closing price

Circuit.definition: Automatic halt when stock price moves ±7.5% from previous close to prevent panic trading

Ready Market.definition: Secondary market where listed securities are traded between investors after initial issuance

Futures.definition: Forward contracts for delivery of securities at a predetermined price on a future date

CDC.definition: Custodian of securities, manages electronic book entry of shares

NCCPL.full_form: National Clearing and Settlement System Limited
NCCPL.definition: Central counter-party and settlement organization for PSX

KSE.definition: Main stock exchange of Pakistan (now called Pakistan Stock Exchange)

PSX.definition: Primary stock exchange in Pakistan, renamed from KSE in 2016

IPO.definition: First offering of shares to public by a private company

Rights Issue.definition: Offering of new shares to existing shareholders at discounted rates, maintaining ownership proportion

Bonus Issue.definition: Free shares distributed to existing shareholders from retained earnings

Dividend.definition: Distribution of profits to shareholders, can be cash or stock

Rights Allotment.definition: Assignment of subscription rights to existing shareholders

Forced Selling.definition: Selling of shares by broker due to non-payment or margin requirements

Authorized Capital.definition: Maximum capital a company is authorized to issue as per its registration

Book Value.definition: Net worth of company per share (Equity/Outstanding Shares)

Earnings Per Share.definition: Company's profit divided by number of shares outstanding

Price to Earnings Ratio.definition: Stock price divided by earnings per share; valuation metric

Portfolio.definition: Collection of securities held by an investor

Volatility.definition: Measure of price fluctuation over a period

Bid.definition: Highest price a buyer is willing to pay for a security

Ask.definition: Lowest price a seller is willing to accept for a security

Spread.definition: Difference between bid and ask prices

Volume.definition: Total number of shares traded in a security during a period

Listing.definition: Addition of a security to the official list for trading on the exchange

Delisting.definition: Removal of security from exchange listing due to non-compliance or other reasons

Limit Up.definition: Price movement reaches the upper circuit limit (+7.5%)

Limit Down.definition: Price movement reaches the lower circuit limit (-7.5%)

indices.description: Primary stock index comprising top 100 companies by market capitalization; represents 80% of total market cap

market_statistics.regulatory_body: Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP)
market_statistics.settlement_system: NCCPL (National Clearing and Settlement System Limited)

sector_characteristics.growth: Higher growth potential, expansion phase, reinvesting profits
sector_characteristics.value: Established companies, stable earnings, lower valuations
sector_characteristics.cyclical: Performance tied to economic cycles, sensitive to market conditions

investment_considerations.market_volatility: Emerging market with moderate to high volatility
investment_considerations.liquidity: Major indices highly liquid; smaller stocks may have lower liquidity
investment_considerations.regulatory_environment: Governed by SECP with stringent disclosure requirements
investment_considerations.currency_risk: PKR exposure; consider hedging for foreign investors
investment_considerations.political_risk: Pakistan is geopolitically sensitive; monitor political developments
investment_considerations.economic_factors: Inflation, interest rates, and GDP growth impact market performance
